reviews.author: John
reviews.text: TM Ward's cannot be beat! They've got it all! They've got coffee, tea, candy, peanuts. You name it, they've got it! They've got so many different coffee flavors, blends, and single-origin choices it'll do your head in! You gotta get the 🥜 when they're hot. I don't know if there's a schedule when they heat them up, but they're better hot.
reviews.textTranslated: TM Ward's memang tak tertandingi! Mereka punya semuanya! Ada kopi, teh, permen, kacang. Sebutkan saja, mereka punya! Mereka punya begitu banyak pilihan rasa kopi, campuran, dan kopi single-origin sampai bikin pusing! Kamu harus beli es krim selagi panas. Aku nggak tahu jadwal pemanasannya, tapi rasanya lebih enak saat panas.

reviews.author: Katyusca VZ
reviews.text: Excelente Calidad y Servicio
reviews.textTranslated: Kualitas dan Layanan yang Sangat Baik

reviews.author: kay
reviews.text: Way to ruin a wonderful morning. The cashier wasn't paying attention to the barista, rang me up incorrectly, and then chased me out of the store to yell at me for “underpaying”. Being treated like a thief over a $2 internal error is unacceptable and unprofessional. I’ve been a regular lately since my usual spot’s espresso machine has been down, but after being publicly accused and insulted, I won't be returning.
reviews.textTranslated: Sungguh cara yang buruk untuk merusak pagi yang indah. Kasir tidak memperhatikan barista, salah menghitung total belanjaan saya, dan kemudian mengusir saya dari toko sambil membentak saya karena "kurang bayar". Diperlakukan seperti pencuri hanya karena kesalahan internal sebesar $2 tidak dapat diterima dan tidak profesional. Saya sudah menjadi pelanggan tetap akhir-akhir ini karena mesin espresso di tempat favorit saya sedang rusak, tetapi setelah dituduh dan dihina di depan umum, saya tidak akan kembali lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Kay - Sorry to hear this - I will be looking into this asap. This is unacceptable and should not have happened.

reviews.author: D. R.C.
reviews.text: Our local coffee place! Great prices and the BEST coffee. So glad we live nearby this Newark classic.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi langganan kami! Harga terjangkau dan kopi TERBAIK. Senang sekali kami tinggal dekat dengan tempat klasik Newark ini.

reviews.author: Jason Saad
reviews.text: Best coffee beans and throw back store!
reviews.textTranslated: Biji kopi terbaik dan toko barang antik!

reviews.author: Jeanne Gilliland
reviews.text:
In spite of Google search failing to list TMWard under “coffee”, I found them by word of mouth while working in Newark for the day.
What an amazing coffee shop! Lots of bean, blends and great fresh coffee to choose from. One of the owners let me pick the bean for my cortado yesterday! The young Ward was working with his team and took time to greet all the local folks filling the shop at 9:30a. There are over 20 varieties of brewed coffee to choose from everyday.
Google did not list this historic expert gem of a coffee house when I tried to search “coffee” and as a dedicated Google user and level 6 guide I’m reporting the gap to help make this right and list TMWard.
reviews.textTranslated:
Meskipun pencarian Google gagal mencantumkan TMWard di bawah "kopi", saya menemukannya dari mulut ke mulut saat bekerja di Newark seharian.
Kedai kopi yang luar biasa! Banyak pilihan biji kopi, campuran kopi, dan kopi segar yang lezat. Salah satu pemiliknya mengizinkan saya memilih biji kopi untuk cortado saya kemarin! Ward muda itu sedang bekerja dengan timnya dan meluangkan waktu untuk menyapa semua penduduk setempat yang memenuhi kedai pada pukul 09.30. Ada lebih dari 20 jenis kopi seduh yang dapat dipilih setiap hari.
Google tidak mencantumkan kedai kopi bersejarah yang luar biasa ini ketika saya mencoba mencari "kopi". Sebagai pengguna Google yang berdedikasi dan pemandu level 6, saya melaporkan kekurangan tersebut untuk membantu memperbaikinya dan mencantumkan TMWard.

reviews.author: SLK
reviews.text: I ordered a 1 pound bag of “filled” hard candy, for $8.99, order#34709. I opened the bag and it was a 1 pound bag of “non filled” candy.. I also just realized that I was charged $31.09 for this 1 pound of candy that was $8.99, WHAT IN THE World WAS THE ADDITIONAL $22.10 charge. If I am told it was for shipping then I have truly been RIPPED OFF. Buyer beware, this company is a scam!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan sekantong permen keras "isi" seberat 1 pon seharga $8,99, nomor pesanan 34709. Saya membuka kantongnya dan ternyata isinya permen "tanpa isi" seberat 1 pon. Saya juga baru sadar kalau saya ditagih $31,09 untuk permen seberat 1 pon yang harganya $8,99 itu. APA YA TAMBAHAN $22,10? Kalau saya diberi tahu itu untuk ongkos kirim, berarti saya benar-benar DIRAJIN. Hati-hati, perusahaan ini penipu!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Well first of all the price is $9.99 so you got a deal. Second you ordered s filled- so if iy was not filled why would you not contact us? and 3rd $22.10 was shipping charge which you didn't take the time to look at and if you had you would have choosen the cheaper shipping offered. So before you post a nasty review get you facts straight - we would have gladly refunded you or replaced no questions asked

reviews.author: Sharrieffa Howard
reviews.text: I'm so glad this place is still here as soon as you walk in the smell brings back memories they will grind the coffee for you . Everyone is so nice and engaging bravo to them and Thank you for years of excellent  service.
reviews.textTranslated: Senang sekali tempat ini masih ada. Begitu masuk, aromanya membangkitkan kenangan. Mereka akan menggiling kopi untuk Anda. Semua orang sangat ramah dan menyenangkan. Bravo untuk mereka. Terima kasih atas layanan yang luar biasa selama bertahun-tahun.

reviews.author: interzonatron
reviews.text: a fundamental institution for the preservation of classic coffee culture.
reviews.textTranslated: sebuah lembaga fundamental untuk pelestarian budaya kopi klasik.

reviews.author: Mychal Hicks
reviews.text:
Ordered a "didiesse frog espresso machine" in DEC24. Never really used it due to travel. Used it a few times after season of travel halted. Machine came to me with a broken steamer - and was not extracting as l've seen it done before. Reached out for customer support later - sent it back (had to pay for shipping) - then wouldn't get any updates as to what was done to it - asked for pictures / updates (I did this so I know they were working on this and not holding onto my asset to make it seem like they were working on it).
I also asked for my asset's steamer to be put back on...2ish weeks pass by - they tell me I need new espresso pods. So I bought the pods. They then tell me I need to pay for shipping from them to me. Asset comes back with more or less the same way of bubble wrap I did when I shipped it - but new tape job on my box. Steamer was not attached as per my request - machine now is still working the same way as before...dribbling the weak espresso shot. Communication was horrid. I have no trust that they actually worked on my asset - as they never updated me. All I asked for was an update every other week - I wanted to know that issue as to why my machine is not as good as the ones I am used to...radio silence. I've descaled my espresso machine, cleaned, and bought the new espresso pods - still working as when I first bought it: Defective asset. My family has this same machine in Costa Rica. When they visited and I told them I got this "worked on" - I then pulled them an espresso shot and my family guaranteed me that this isn't a normal pull. I'd like customer service to reach out to me immediately to discuss this further to refund me the money I spent on this asset - and refund the shipping as l am positive this asset was sitting in the back and was truly not worked on until I kept kindly harassing them via email about updates.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan "mesin espresso Didiesse Frog" pada Desember 2024. Saya tidak pernah benar-benar menggunakannya karena sering bepergian. Saya menggunakannya beberapa kali setelah musim perjalanan berakhir. Mesin yang saya terima memiliki steamer yang rusak - dan tidak mengekstrak kopi seperti yang pernah saya lihat sebelumnya. Saya menghubungi layanan pelanggan kemudian - mengirimkannya kembali (harus membayar ongkos kirim) - lalu tidak mendapatkan informasi terbaru tentang apa yang telah dilakukan - saya meminta foto/informasi terbaru (saya melakukan ini agar saya tahu mereka sedang mengerjakannya dan tidak menahan aset saya untuk membuat seolah-olah mereka sedang mengerjakannya).
Saya juga meminta agar steamer aset saya dipasang kembali... sekitar 2 minggu berlalu - mereka memberi tahu saya bahwa saya membutuhkan pod espresso baru. Jadi saya membeli pod tersebut. Kemudian mereka memberi tahu saya bahwa saya perlu membayar ongkos kirim dari mereka ke saya. Aset tersebut kembali dengan cara pembungkus gelembung yang kurang lebih sama seperti saat saya mengirimkannya - tetapi dengan lakban baru pada kotak saya. Steamer tidak dipasang sesuai permintaan saya - mesin sekarang masih bekerja dengan cara yang sama seperti sebelumnya... menghasilkan espresso yang encer. Komunikasi sangat buruk. Saya tidak percaya mereka benar-benar mengerjakan aset saya - karena mereka tidak pernah memberi saya kabar terbaru. Yang saya minta hanyalah pembaruan setiap dua minggu sekali - saya ingin tahu masalah mengapa mesin saya tidak sebagus mesin yang biasa saya gunakan... tetapi tidak ada kabar sama sekali. Saya sudah membersihkan kerak mesin espresso saya, membersihkannya, dan membeli kapsul espresso baru - masih berfungsi seperti saat pertama kali saya membelinya: Aset yang cacat. Keluarga saya memiliki mesin yang sama di Kosta Rika. Ketika mereka berkunjung dan saya memberi tahu mereka bahwa saya telah "memperbaikinya" - saya kemudian membuatkan mereka secangkir espresso dan keluarga saya menjamin bahwa ini bukan hasil seduhan normal. Saya ingin layanan pelanggan segera menghubungi saya untuk membahas ini lebih lanjut dan mengembalikan uang yang telah saya keluarkan untuk aset ini - dan mengembalikan biaya pengiriman karena saya yakin aset ini berada di belakang dan benar-benar tidak diperbaiki sampai saya terus-menerus menghubungi mereka melalui email untuk meminta pembaruan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Machine worked perfect for us, with our pods- have you tried them? Also if steam wand was not attached the fault is on us - tech said it was put back on. As far as responding to emails - I personally responded to all, you sent. As far as shipping -you asked for 2 day shipping, we dont do that and we told you - we give free standard shipping 3-4 days - So that was your doing - Send back the machine and you can get a refund not a problem at all- we'd be happy to take it back

reviews.author: Hạnh Trần
reviews.text: Not only is the coffee here fantastic, but the food is surprisingly great too. I ordered a latte and a breakfast sandwich, and both were delicious. The sandwich was fresh, warm, and filling — way better than what you’d expect from a coffee shop. The latte was smooth and creamy, exactly how I like it. The staff was friendly and made the whole experience easy. The shop has a relaxed vibe that makes you want to stay and hang out. The décor is stylish without trying too hard. Prices are fair, especially given the portion sizes. Everything tasted fresh, which makes a big difference. It’s rare to find a coffee shop that nails both drinks and food. I’ll definitely be back for breakfast again soon.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi di sini tidak hanya fantastis, tetapi makanannya juga luar biasa lezat. Saya memesan latte dan sandwich sarapan, dan keduanya lezat. Sandwichnya segar, hangat, dan mengenyangkan — jauh lebih nikmat daripada yang Anda harapkan dari kedai kopi. Latte-nya lembut dan creamy, persis seperti yang saya suka. Stafnya ramah dan membuat seluruh pengalaman terasa mudah. ​​Kedai ini memiliki suasana santai yang membuat Anda ingin tetap tinggal dan bersantai. Dekorasinya bergaya tanpa terlalu memaksakan diri. Harganya wajar, terutama mengingat ukuran porsinya. Semuanya terasa segar, yang membuat perbedaan besar. Jarang menemukan kedai kopi yang menyajikan minuman dan makanan yang sempurna. Saya pasti akan kembali untuk sarapan lagi dalam waktu dekat.

reviews.author: Gabriela Luna Delgado
reviews.text: Best coffee shop in Chelsea
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi terbaik di Chelsea

reviews.author: Hamzi R
reviews.text: It's ok
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak apa-apa

reviews.author: Ricky Henry
reviews.text: awesome little place i found while doing work at the arena. showed my buddy on the way to the airport. i could have stood there all day chatting with the owner, if it weren't for the time crunch
reviews.textTranslated: tempat kecil yang mengagumkan yang saya temukan saat bekerja di arena. Saya tunjukkan pada teman saya dalam perjalanan ke bandara. Saya bisa berdiri di sana sepanjang hari mengobrol dengan pemiliknya, jika saja tidak karena keterbatasan waktu.

reviews.author: Rody Mohmed
reviews.text: Very bad
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat buruk
reviews.responseFromOwner: why's that rody? Let us know so we can fix or improve

reviews.author: Manu Rendon
reviews.text: Excellent coffee shop, extremely authentic serving  the public for 150 years
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi yang luar biasa, sangat otentik melayani publik selama 150 tahun

reviews.author: James Ansman
reviews.text: Excellent coffee at a unbelievable price. Thank you
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang luar biasa dengan harga yang tak tertandingi. Terima kasih.

reviews.author: Helder Jacinto
reviews.text:
I like coffee.

My wife says I'm a coffee snob. I've been a customer of TM Ward for about 7 years and I am very very happy with the product. They have a lot of varieties, great prices and great coffee. I am always changing up and its rare that I don't like the coffee. There Kona Blend (which has 0% Kona) is currently my favorite its smooth, tasty with a great aroma. Better than actual Kona. They roast to your liking and since I'm not a dark roast fan the coffees are exactly as I like it. I grind all my coffee (even drip coffee) and what a difference that makes.  For espresso I get the Portuguese Blend and it tastes like I'm having a coffee in Portugal. You can't go wrong with TM Ward.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya suka kopi.

Istri saya bilang saya seorang penikmat kopi sejati. Saya sudah menjadi pelanggan TM Ward selama sekitar 7 tahun dan saya sangat senang dengan produknya. Mereka memiliki banyak variasi, harga yang bagus, dan kopi yang enak. Saya selalu berganti-ganti dan jarang sekali saya tidak menyukai kopinya. Kona Blend mereka (yang tidak mengandung Kona sama sekali) saat ini adalah favorit saya, rasanya lembut, enak, dan aromanya luar biasa. Lebih enak daripada Kona asli. Mereka memanggang sesuai selera Anda dan karena saya bukan penggemar sangrai gelap, kopi yang mereka buat persis seperti yang saya suka. Saya menggiling semua kopi saya (bahkan kopi tetes) dan perbedaannya sangat besar. Untuk espresso, saya memesan Portuguese Blend dan rasanya seperti sedang minum kopi di Portugal. Anda tidak akan salah memilih TM Ward.

reviews.author: Chelsea Lopes-Carnicella
reviews.text: Best customer service. I ordered a pick up for Father’s Day of some coffee beans. Didn’t realize with my 8-5 job that I would have no time to pick them up with the store business hours. They are so sweet they personally called me to see if I still wanted my pickup - when I explained my situation they offered to drop them off to my dads house in another town… and they did!!! Hand delivered!!! I was very happy and so was my dad. Thank you again! So genuine and nice I had to leave a review.
reviews.textTranslated: Layanan pelanggan terbaik. Saya memesan biji kopi untuk diambil sendiri untuk Hari Ayah. Saya tidak menyangka dengan pekerjaan saya yang padat, saya tidak punya waktu untuk mengambilnya karena jam operasional toko. Mereka sangat ramah, mereka menelepon saya secara pribadi untuk menanyakan apakah saya masih ingin mengambil sendiri - ketika saya menjelaskan situasi saya, mereka menawarkan untuk mengantarkannya ke rumah ayah saya di kota lain... dan mereka melakukannya!!! Diantar langsung!!! Saya sangat senang, begitu pula ayah saya. Terima kasih sekali lagi! Sangat tulus dan baik, saya harus meninggalkan ulasan.

reviews.author: Ed Z
reviews.text: Have been going here for years! Newark’s  hidden gem downtown! Service is always impeccable. Our family and friends love your Garden State blend, and the nuts and licorice are a must!! Thank you so much…
reviews.textTranslated: Sudah bertahun-tahun saya ke sini! Permata tersembunyi di pusat kota Newark! Pelayanannya selalu sempurna. Keluarga dan teman-teman kami suka campuran Garden State Anda, dan kacang serta licorice-nya wajib dicoba! Terima kasih banyak…

reviews.author: Rui Oliveira
reviews.responseFromOwner: Rui -Please let us know what went wrong - without any review we don't know where to try and improve - please feel free to reach out directly at tmwardcoffee.com

reviews.author: Troy Green
reviews.text: So it smelled great & so many things inside... ordered a large latte & went looking around.   Couple minutes go by I come back to the front and reached to grab my drink and she's handing it to a cop that walked in a couple minutes behind me and said I didn't even explain if I wanted sugar and cinnamon or what kind of latte I wanted.... Now drinking it & it's horrible...
reviews.textTranslated: Jadi, aromanya enak sekali & banyak sekali isinya... pesan latte besar & lihat-lihat. Beberapa menit berlalu, saya kembali ke depan dan meraih minuman saya, dan dia menyerahkannya kepada polisi yang datang beberapa menit di belakang saya dan bilang saya bahkan tidak menjelaskan apakah saya mau gula dan kayu manis atau latte jenis apa yang saya mau.... Sekarang saya meminumnya & rasanya mengerikan...
reviews.responseFromOwner: Im so sorry Troy -not good on our part!- i will address this immediatly with the server. Please come in for a refund!

reviews.author: akiya ruth
reviews.text: Good
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus

reviews.author: GLAMBYJENNY
reviews.text: Omg best place to get a fresh ice coffee early morning they are so welcoming and friendly always have a smile in their face and just making your morning amazing I really really recommend for them to my coffee lovers out their ❤️ also I would for them to sale ice coffee cups or mugs👌🏻💯
reviews.textTranslated: Ya ampun tempat terbaik untuk mendapatkan es kopi segar di pagi hari, mereka sangat ramah dan bersahabat, selalu tersenyum dan membuat pagi Anda luar biasa. Saya sangat merekomendasikan mereka kepada pecinta kopi di luar sana ❤️ dan saya juga ingin mereka menjual cangkir atau mug es kopi 👌🏻💯
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you!! glad to hear it!

reviews.author: scotts mlla
reviews.text: After reading my first review regarding the beans being burnt, Robert responded.  Very stand- up of him to replace the order with much better roasted beans.  You can actually smell coffee.  We had the Brazil this morning and the flavor was medium, not acidic,  a little nutty.  Greatly appreciate a business that stands up to their products and respects their customers.  Hard to find these days.  Thank you
reviews.textTranslated: Setelah membaca ulasan pertama saya tentang biji kopi yang gosong, Robert merespons. Dia sangat baik hati mengganti pesanan dengan biji kopi panggang yang jauh lebih baik. Aroma kopinya benar-benar tercium. Kami memesan kopi Brazil pagi ini dan rasanya sedang, tidak asam, sedikit pedas. Sangat menghargai bisnis yang berani mempertahankan produk mereka dan menghargai pelanggan. Sulit menemukannya akhir-akhir ini. Terima kasih.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Sorry to here this did you order a dark roast or medium? We have not had any complaints
Send me an email @ wardscoffee@gmail.com and we can make it right - we are really proud of our coffees and stand by them! We roast 15-20000 lbs a week please let me know - Robert

reviews.author: Sayblend
reviews.text: Very good coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang sangat enak.

reviews.author: Abby Madison
reviews.text: a fun coffee experience, other than the typical chain. I'm SO GLAD I walked to TM Ward, what a great surprise! The place is charming, has a great history, going back 4 generations! Many pots of different coffees brewing, too many to taste! The place has barrels of beans, all kinds for sale..and it smells outstanding! The service is great, welcoming, and knowledgeable
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman ngopi yang menyenangkan, berbeda dari kedai kopi waralaba pada umumnya. Saya SANGAT SENANG telah berjalan kaki ke TM Ward, sungguh kejutan yang menyenangkan! Tempatnya menawan, memiliki sejarah yang hebat, bahkan sudah ada sejak 4 generasi! Banyak sekali jenis kopi yang diseduh, terlalu banyak untuk dicicipi! Tempat ini memiliki tong-tong berisi biji kopi, semua jenis dijual... dan aromanya luar biasa! Pelayanannya bagus, ramah, dan berpengetahuan luas.

reviews.author: Lamouria Boyd
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks! What can we do to make things better? Please feel free to contact us at wardscoffee@gmail.com

reviews.author: Gloria Cottle
reviews.text: Love shopping here. My dad would take me here when I was a teenager. I won't tell my age,but I been going for over forty years. Still excellent quality goods.Loving Wards. Thank you for staying around.
reviews.textTranslated: Senang sekali berbelanja di sini. Ayah saya sering mengajak saya ke sini waktu remaja. Saya tidak akan menyebutkan usia saya, tapi saya sudah berbelanja di sini selama lebih dari empat puluh tahun. Kualitas barangnya masih sangat bagus. Wards yang saya sayangi. Terima kasih sudah berbelanja di sini.

reviews.author: Manuel Couto
reviews.text: Old world coffee distributor and new world smiles.  This is the oldest coffee shop in Newark with over 150 years of history and love
reviews.textTranslated: Distributor kopi dunia lama dan senyum dunia baru. Ini adalah kedai kopi tertua di Newark dengan sejarah dan cinta lebih dari 150 tahun.

reviews.author: Bryant Dixon
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Bryant - you didn'y leave a review for the 1 star?- How can we improve if you don't let us know what was wrong?

reviews.author: AJ
reviews.text: It's heaps of coffee as soon as you walk in. More than a century old, they make you a blend just how you like it. I usually go there for the African coffee beans. All the single origins are available here!!
reviews.textTranslated: Begitu masuk, Anda akan disambut dengan sajian kopi yang melimpah. Kedai kopi ini sudah berdiri lebih dari seabad, dan mereka bisa meracik kopi sesuai selera Anda. Saya biasanya ke sana untuk membeli biji kopi Afrika. Semua jenis kopi single origin tersedia di sini!

reviews.author: Stephanie Arrington
reviews.text: Love the nuts there.  Fresh roasted peanuts are the best. They have snacks even for those who are diabetic.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka kacang-kacangan di sana. Kacang tanah panggang segar adalah yang terbaik. Mereka juga menyediakan camilan untuk penderita diabetes.

reviews.author: Autumn Anderson
reviews.text: I love their dried fruits and nuts and old fashioned candies.  They also have great medicinal teas and wonderful coffee and coffee beans. A great place!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka buah-buahan kering, kacang-kacangan, dan permen tradisional mereka. Mereka juga punya teh herbal yang enak, kopi, dan biji kopi yang luar biasa. Tempat yang luar biasa!

reviews.author: Devin Hall
reviews.text:
Loads of different types of coffee beans and flavors. And if I'm not coming here for the coffee I'm picking up from their huge selection of candies or natural foods. They grind their own peanut butter right in the back of the shop. And all the staff are friendly and helpful. Yes they sell tea, too.

Edit: Just saw the Peanut Butter and Egg Nog syrups to die for
reviews.textTranslated:
Banyak sekali jenis biji kopi dan rasa yang berbeda. Dan jika saya tidak datang ke sini untuk kopi, saya akan membeli berbagai macam permen atau makanan alami dari pilihan mereka yang sangat banyak. Mereka menggiling selai kacang sendiri di bagian belakang toko. Dan semua stafnya ramah dan membantu. Ya, mereka juga menjual teh.

Edit: Baru saja melihat sirup Selai Kacang dan Egg Nog yang sangat lezat!

reviews.author: Jonathan Lewis
reviews.text: Friendly staff, quaint atmosphere, great snacks, A M A Z I N G coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Staf yang ramah, suasana yang unik, makanan ringan yang lezat, kopi yang LUAR BIASA

reviews.author: Cynthia “Cent118” Taylor
reviews.text: Hot roasted peanuts wow
reviews.textTranslated: Kacang panggang panas, wow!

reviews.author: Sharon S
reviews.text: Favorite place to buy my beans
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat favorit untuk membeli kacang saya

reviews.author: Daryl Poe
reviews.text: Yes yes yes
reviews.textTranslated: Ya ya ya

reviews.author: Jay Rabin
reviews.text: Amazing selection and quality!
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan dan kualitasnya luar biasa!

reviews.author: sunywea nicholsun
reviews.text: Jamaican me crazy is one of my go to coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Jamaican Me Crazy adalah salah satu kopi favorit saya.

reviews.author: Margaret Anne Waxmonsky Ohanian
reviews.text: I don't always get to go to the store but have been ordering coffee and bulk candy from them for years! Good prices and quality.  Fast shipping ! Happy, happy,  happiness!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tidak selalu bisa pergi ke toko, tapi saya sudah memesan kopi dan permen dalam jumlah besar dari mereka selama bertahun-tahun! Harga dan kualitasnya bagus. Pengirimannya cepat! Senang, senang, senang sekali!!!

reviews.author: Courageous Soul
reviews.text: Great place! I've been going there since I was a little girl over 50 years ago. It should be a historic landmark in the city of Newark.  You can't beat the quality of their products anywhere in Newark.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus! Saya telah pergi ke sana sejak saya masih kecil lebih dari 50 tahun yang lalu. Ini harus menjadi landmark bersejarah di kota Newark.  Anda tidak dapat mengalahkan kualitas produk mereka di mana pun di Newark.

reviews.author: VV Lenard
reviews.text: Love it!!
reviews.textTranslated: Suka sekali!!

reviews.author: Heather Hernandez
reviews.text: Stayed at the Doubletree Hotel at Penn Station and wanted a fun coffee experience, other than the typical chain. I'm SO GLAD I walked to TM Ward, what a great surprise! The place is charming, has a great history, going back 4 generations! Many pots of different coffees brewing, too many to taste! The place has barrels of beans, all kinds for sale..and it smells outstanding! The service is great, welcoming, and knowledgeable
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menginap di Hotel Doubletree di Penn Station dan ingin menikmati pengalaman kopi yang menyenangkan, selain dari kedai kopi waralaba biasa. Saya SANGAT SENANG telah berjalan kaki ke TM Ward, sungguh kejutan yang menyenangkan! Tempatnya menawan, memiliki sejarah yang hebat, bahkan hingga 4 generasi! Banyak sekali jenis kopi yang diseduh, terlalu banyak untuk dicicipi! Tempat ini memiliki banyak sekali biji kopi, berbagai macam untuk dijual... dan aromanya luar biasa! Pelayanannya bagus, ramah, dan berpengetahuan luas.
reviews.responseFromOwner: So glad you stopped by!!! Thank you 😊

reviews.author: Michael Buford
reviews.text: Their service was extraordinary and the food was wonderful.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan mereka luar biasa dan makanannya lezat.

reviews.author: MARIELY CRUZ
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the review!!! Our customers are#1

reviews.author: Deborah Brown
reviews.text: Coffee lover's paradise...I also like the candy, assorted nuts and my favorite Beet Chips!!!. .a long standing establishment in Newark.
reviews.textTranslated: Surga bagi pecinta kopi... Saya juga suka permen, berbagai macam kacang, dan favorit saya, Keripik Bit!!!. .sebuah tempat yang sudah lama berdiri di Newark.

reviews.author: Indra Robinson
reviews.text: A must see! Words cannot express how amazing this place is. Coffee is grounded for you on location and they have chocolate and treats that you can’t find anywhere. If you are visiting from out of town and want something authentic and beyond great...stop in here- you will not be disappointed. They have loose tea as well
reviews.textTranslated: Wajib dikunjungi! Kata-kata tidak dapat menggambarkan betapa menakjubkannya tempat ini. Kopi digiling langsung di tempat dan mereka memiliki cokelat serta camilan yang tidak dapat Anda temukan di tempat lain. Jika Anda berkunjung dari luar kota dan menginginkan sesuatu yang otentik dan luar biasa... mampirlah ke sini - Anda tidak akan kecewa. Mereka juga memiliki teh daun lepas.

reviews.author: Tajpaul Etwaroo
reviews.text: Love TM Wards... always super nice to me and courteous... best brew in town... this isnt dunkin or starbucks ...this is beyond those chain places.. i even got official Jamaican Blue Mountain coffee here
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka TM Wards... selalu sangat ramah dan sopan kepada saya... kopi terbaik di kota... ini bukan Dunkin atau Starbucks... ini jauh lebih baik dari tempat-tempat waralaba itu... saya bahkan mendapatkan kopi Jamaican Blue Mountain asli di sini.

reviews.author: Victor Ogo
reviews.text: Best place to buy coffee in Newark, NJ
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat terbaik untuk membeli kopi di Newark, NJ

reviews.author: Kiffin Kilkenny
reviews.text: Very friendly everything is fresh
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat ramah, semuanya segar.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you!! Our customers are the best!!!

reviews.author: Solomon Awuku
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for being a great customer!  People like you have made us what we are today! Big thanks!!!

reviews.author: Jamie Bruno
reviews.text: They have delicious coffee and snacks and tiny ginsings.
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka menyediakan kopi dan makanan ringan yang lezat serta ginsing kecil.

reviews.author: David Krill
reviews.text: Fresh ground coffee, fresh ground peanut butter, chocolate covered everything. A must stop whenever I'm in the area.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi bubuk segar, selai kacang bubuk segar, segala sesuatu dilapisi cokelat. Wajib dikunjungi setiap kali saya berada di daerah itu.

reviews.author: Shirley Mack
reviews.text: Excellent
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus sekali

reviews.author: Jeff Black
reviews.text: Great service wide variety.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan hebat, pilihan beragam.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Customers like you keep us going!! Thank you!!

reviews.author: Gregory Washington
reviews.text: The best variety of coffee beans and loose tea leaves available anywhere under one roof. And they even sell K-cups of their stuff now.
reviews.textTranslated: Berbagai macam biji kopi dan daun teh terbaik yang tersedia di mana saja, semuanya dalam satu atap. Mereka bahkan menjual K-cup produk mereka sekarang.

reviews.author: David Reparsky
reviews.text: If you're a Avid coffee drinker this is a must stop if you're in Newark. The smell is intoxicating as you walk through the door you're hit with multiple coffee Aromas with the mixture of Sweetness from the candies and the roasting of the nuts. The Latte is unbelievably good huge selection of different roasts and different beans lots of assortments a nuts in fresh dried fruits along with candies and chocolate covered everything
reviews.textTranslated: Jika Anda seorang penikmat kopi sejati, tempat ini wajib dikunjungi jika Anda sedang berada di Newark. Aromanya begitu memikat saat Anda melangkah masuk, dan Anda akan disuguhi beragam aroma kopi, perpaduan manisnya permen dan kacang panggang. Latte-nya luar biasa lezat, dengan banyak pilihan biji kopi panggang dan beragam pilihan kacang, buah kering segar, permen, dan cokelat.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for being a great customer!!

reviews.author: Herbert Quattlebaum (The Urban Runner)
reviews.text: THE BEST ROASTED PEANUTS IN THE CITY
reviews.textTranslated: KACANG PANGGANG TERBAIK DI KOTA INI

reviews.author: Open World Ent
reviews.text: I love this place!
reviews.textTranslated: Aku suka tempat ini!

reviews.author: Franklin Coleman
reviews.text: This store, which is nearly a century old, has bins of coffee beans, and one may buy the whole bean form, or have them ground right there. There are also a large selection of teas, nuts, candies and the like. One can also get brewed coffee to go.
reviews.textTranslated: Toko ini, yang sudah berusia hampir seabad, memiliki banyak wadah berisi biji kopi, dan Anda bisa membeli biji kopi utuh atau langsung menggilingnya. Tersedia juga beragam pilihan teh, kacang, permen, dan sejenisnya. Anda juga bisa memesan kopi seduh untuk dibawa pulang.

reviews.author: LaTrice Chambers
reviews.text: Awesome old fashion environment with quality coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Suasana klasik yang luar biasa dengan kopi berkualitas.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you! And thank you for being a customer! People Like you are what keeps us going! Newark!!!!

reviews.author: mathmaddict
reviews.text: Coffee, cake slices, candies and treats!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi, potongan kue, permen, dan camilan!

reviews.author: Maurice Fiorenza
reviews.text: I love a good coffee. Yes the day I walked in when they got a new shipment of teas, it was beyond amazing. I still like coffee better but now there's a verybut now there's a very good spot for tea and me.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka kopi yang enak. Ya, hari ketika saya datang saat mereka menerima kiriman teh baru, rasanya luar biasa. Saya masih lebih suka kopi, tetapi sekarang ada tempat yang sangat bagus untuk teh dan saya.

reviews.author: Linda Reynolds
reviews.text: Love it!
reviews.textTranslated: Suka sekali!

reviews.author: jennifer smith
reviews.text: Delicious
reviews.textTranslated: Lezat

reviews.author: Tim Arnold
reviews.text: Best coffee anywhere
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi terbaik di mana saja

reviews.author: Suzi Crapanzano
reviews.text: One of the benefits to working in the federal court building was the ability to shop in this incredible establishment. The wonderful aroma as you walk in the door sets the mood for the experience. Not only are their products unequalled in this area but the staff could not be more knowledgeable nor more courteous. Yep, time for a trip to Newark.
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu keuntungan bekerja di gedung pengadilan federal adalah bisa berbelanja di tempat yang luar biasa ini. Aroma harum yang menyambut Anda saat memasuki toko langsung menciptakan suasana yang menyenangkan. Produk mereka bukan hanya tak tertandingi di daerah ini, tetapi stafnya juga sangat berpengetahuan dan ramah. Ya, saatnya berkunjung ke Newark.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much! Great to hear!!

reviews.author: Victory Taylor
reviews.text: Best Coffee selection.. Wonderful attendants...
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan kopi terbaik... Pelayan yang ramah...

reviews.author: Delores Brown
reviews.responseFromOwner: Wow Delores not sure why you would give 1 star without a review. Sounds like your angry! Please feel free to contact us- so we can work and learn from our mistakes!!

reviews.author: Daniel Shalikar
reviews.text: Great coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak.

reviews.author: Sheila Jackson
reviews.text: I love this place. Great selection of coffee, tea, nuts and dried fruit. Their coffee is absolute best! the
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini. Pilihan kopi, teh, kacang-kacangan, dan buah keringnya luar biasa. Kopi mereka benar-benar yang terbaik!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Great to hear ! our customers are the best!

reviews.author: Dreya Teel
reviews.text: They have the best peanuts and coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka punya kacang dan kopi terbaik.

reviews.author: Wanny Wong
reviews.text: Great roast nut selection!
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan kacang panggang yang luar biasa!

reviews.author: Charlene Greene
reviews.text: A gem in Newark NJ great coffee the lady place left to where you can still buy fresh roasted peanuts daily, large variety of candy can be found there when Newark use to have a candy store in every neighborhood.
reviews.textTranslated: Sebuah permata di Newark, NJ, tempat kopi yang enak, tempat milik seorang wanita yang masih mempertahankan tradisi di mana Anda masih bisa membeli kacang panggang segar setiap hari, berbagai macam permen dapat ditemukan di sana karena dulu Newark memiliki toko permen di setiap lingkungan.

reviews.author: Shermera Dismuke
reviews.text: People were very friendly and down to earth.
reviews.textTranslated: Orang-orangnya sangat ramah dan bersahaja.

reviews.author: Melvin Taylor
reviews.text: Coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi

reviews.author: JOHN O. Smith
reviews.text: Awesomeness
reviews.textTranslated: Keangkeran

reviews.author: Danny Glix
reviews.text: chocolate covered cherry cordials FTW
reviews.textTranslated: Minuman ceri berlapis cokelat memang mantap!

reviews.author: Arie Hoogendoorn
reviews.text: Best cup of coffee in Newark, maybe New Jersey
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi terbaik di Newark, mungkin di New Jersey.

reviews.author: Sherrisse Arafat
reviews.text: One of the world's best. They have all the Great Coffees and much more. Generations of goodness!!
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu yang terbaik di dunia. Mereka memiliki semua jenis kopi terbaik dan masih banyak lagi. Kualitas yang diwariskan dari generasi ke generasi!!

reviews.author: K Wetterstrum
reviews.text: I was very happy to find this store in my new neighborhood. Large selection of coffee beans; very cozy inside; attentive and friendly service. Now drinking coffee as I write this review – this coffee is delicious!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat senang menemukan toko ini di lingkungan baru saya. Pilihan biji kopinya banyak; interiornya sangat nyaman; pelayanannya ramah dan penuh perhatian. Saya sedang minum kopi sambil menulis ulasan ini – kopinya sungguh lezat!
